modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Questions about Qualtrics license and offline app access

full_description_text:  
So, I was on the phone with someone. They asked if we can use the offline app for Qualtrics. Also, they wanted to know if students have the same access as faculty. Just trying to figure this out!
short_description: Questions about Qualtrics license and offline app access
description: So, I was on the phone with someone. They asked if we can use the offline app for Qualtrics. Also, they wanted to know if students have the same access as faculty. Just trying to figure this out!
